item.title: Obesity Drug Market & Lilly's Foundayo
item.description:
• Summary: The oral obesity drug market is heating up, with focus on Eli Lilly's Foundayo (orforglipron), an oral GLP-1 receptor agonist. As companies race to develop convenient oral alternatives to injectables like semaglutide, Lilly's launch strategy for Foundayo is critical in capturing share in the rapidly expanding obesity treatment landscape.
  • MoAs: Foundayo (orforglipron): Oral glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor agonist that enhances insulin secretion, suppresses appetite, and promotes weight loss.
  • Sources: Biospace

item.title: Charles River & AHA Cardiovascular Health
item.description:
• Summary: Charles River Laboratories is partnering with the American Heart Association (AHA) in Boston to bridge cardiovascular health divides through community-focused initiatives and outreach programs.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
